title: Q is for Quarantined
wikitext:

[[File:Very Rusty.png]]
'''Kaikibuyo'''
''Description''
With only 1 known case of the phenomenon, information about the illness is extremely limited. What is known is that Kaikibuyo, also known as Steel Heart Disease, comes from an extreme strain of Tetanus, which caused flesh to be broken down and turned into a metallic compound. This bodily response changes the whole body to become more akin to automatons, but due to the tough properties of the metal, the extent of which remains unknown. Over the course of roughly 3 months, these changes take place, eventually turning the victim into a rusted android as well; presumably to infect others by means of physical touch. Patient 0 is a man named Vinny Kramer, and remains under supervision by the [[Entity Research Committee]] at [[Level 40|Rental Place]]. Vinny is deemed safe enough to interact with others considered too hazardous to allow others to interact with him. Anybody found entering Patient 0's chamber must be terminated and their body burned to prevent possible contamination. Entrance into its cell can only be approved of by management staff, and all entering must wear a high-duty filtration mask and cover up all skin with approved protective gear.
'''Kaikibuyo Log 01'''
'''Foreword:''' By the recording of this log, Patient 0 was still considered safe enough to visit without protective gear. This interview is between Vinny Kramer and Adrian Levine. It is believed that Vinny is in the first stage of Kaikibuyo. This stage only consists of the mechanization of human flesh, seemingly not affecting internal organs of other biological systems. In the case of this recording, Patient 0 has only had Steel Heart Disease for 2 weeks. '''Date:''' February 12th, 200X, 22:42

"Hey.. thanks for asking them, dude." "Of course, how are you doing?" "I feel mostly fine, just some irritation on my hand."
''Vinny shows his left hand to Adrian, showing the metallic skin now forming over where there was once a cut. Adrian winces.''
"Shit that looks bad."
''Adrian takes Vinny's hand and moves it closer to his face. There is some non-verbal response from Vinny, but neither party is willing to disclose it.''
"Yea, yea. It'll be fine though. They'll get it fixed up, yea?" "They.. didn't give me a full answer. I'm pretty sure they're gonna look into creating a cure though. I was told that much" ''Sigh'' "I'll take it, I guess." "Mhm. I'll fight like hell for you. Even if it means I have to get infected." "No-no, don't gotta go '''that''' far. It'd be stupid." "Cause then neither of us will be able to get help, and we'll both be like this." "I'd rather suffer with you then not help at all."
''Adrian appears to kiss a non-metallic part of Vinny's hand, and lets go. Vinny pulls his hand back and rubs "the kiss" on his face slowly. As it happens, Adrian stretches his arms upward.''
"You're so sweet... and so stupid." "hahaha, thanks."
''Vinny is seen moving closer to Adrian, now pressing against his side.''
"And hot―but that's for a different day."
''Adrian covers his face, the sound of his laughter does not pick up, though he has confirmed so.''
"I mean you look better, I don't know why, but you do. Eating better or something?" "Yea actually, been trying to take in more protein and workout more." "To the best of my ability at least." "God it's doing you so many favors..." "Do you want to see the difference?" "Oh? Yes please."
''Section cut for patient privacy.''
"So, how long do you got before you get kicked out of my cell?" "They didn't give me a limit." "Fuck yea." "Would you mind if I kept you here?" "No, not at all. I'd be happy to."
'''Log End:''' February 12th, 200X, 23:17

'''Kaikibuyo Log 02'''
'''Foreword:''' Due to concerns of infection as a result of Incident █████████, Patient 0 lost the ability to interact with those not in proper coverage. The ruling also came with permanent separation of Adrian Levine from cell. This document outlines some of the behavior Vinny Kramer engages as it reaches the second stage of Steel Heart Disease. '''Date:''' May 22nd, 200X, 7:18
[7:20]
''Patient 0 wakes up from a knocking on the door, with staff member Ezekiel Thorn then opening the door. He places down a tray of food, and Patient 0 is seen covering themselves up further with the provided blanket. No communication is attempted, with Ezekiel leaving shortly after.'' [7:38]
''Another 20 minutes pass before Patient 0 climbs out of its bedding. The jaw structure which now has replaced its mouth opens as it moves closer to the now cold meal. All movements seen are physically jerky and robotic, and appear to bring it much discomfort. Despite this, it begins to eat.'' [7:42]
''Stage 2 of Steel Heart Disease seems to begin, as Patient 0 appears to get extremely sick from eating common human foods. A staff member is then brought in to give Patient 0 more mechanical foodstuffs. Though still sick, it eats those instead. No negative effects are observed from this.'' [8:53]
''Patient 0 stops pacing around its cell, standing perfectly still for multiple hours.'' [12:04]
''It starts to move again, the movements appear more fluid than previously. X-Rays taken later showed all its muscles now replaced with robotic ones, which caused it to stagnate for a long period of time.'' [12:08]
''The old trays are removed, with another one replacing it. The tray has both mechanical parts and normal food. Seemingly unhappily, Patient 0 eats the machine parts. It looks towards the camera for a moment, before grabbing some paper provided several months earlier, and started to scribble on it.'' [12:10]
''After 1 unsuccessful attempt, it writes out a sentence. Patient 0 then takes the paper and moves it to the camera, holding it closely. On it, inscribed in permanent marker, is the phrase "I still love you." The paper is believed to be for Adrian.''
'''Log End:''' May 22nd, 200X, 12:11

'''Kaikibuyo'''
''Stages of Steel Heart Disease''
Stage 1 immediately starts when a wanderer interacts with an object or individual with Steel Heart Disease. During this stage, all flesh is turned into a metallic compound. This metal, known as KB-1, has similar durability to iron compounds, though is decently more malleable as well. Other bodily affects in stage 1 come as a direct result of the change in skin, with muscles often growing denser and body weight increasing to account for the heavier exterior. All organs and internal functions remain the exact same. Stage 2 starts days after the first stage is completed. In this stage, internal organs and all other natural matter in the body will become mechanized as well. These shifts are much faster, though stagnation is still common. Stagnation is the locking up of body parts for upwards of 2 hours, often to replace them with metallic parts. In this stage, normal food becomes toxic and can damage the infected. This forces the subject to shift to a mechanical diet, and the use of batteries or other electric sources as the main source of energy. Stages beyond this remain unknown, as the original patient later escaped ERC housing. Any information on its whereabouts should be reported as soon as possible. Additionally, further victims of Steel Heart Disease now are unconfirmed, with many assuming it to be a rising population.
'''Kaikibuyo Log 03'''
'''Foreword:''' This log is between Adrian Levine and Hydrolitis' specialist Olivia Patterson. '''Date:''' March 30th, 200X, 13:01
"Do you have any progress on a cure?" "Well, no, but the research we've been able to obtain from Vinny could be essential to solving other Backrooms viruses." "What's that supposed to mean?" "Your friend has a disease that seems nonfatal, which is extremely rare around here. I'm sorry to say, but it's better for us all if he stays afflicted." "So... you're ''not'' going to cure him?" "Not yet, at least." "So, I'm fucked, yea? I came here thinking [[Entity Research Committee|you all]] could help him." "We will help him, just, not yet. There's more people who could use this research to survive." "I promised I'd help him. I promised I'd be there for him." "I can't even tell him this, I can't fucking enter his cell." "You still can appeal it, right? Didn't the ruling happen 3 weeks ago?" "It was denied. So now he thinks I abandoned him and I can't tell him otherwise."
'''Log End:''' March 30th, 200X, 13:05

'''Kaikibuyo'''
''Infection and Theories''
The source of Steel Heart Disease remains unknown, as Patient 0 never confirmed where it came from. However passing from humans to humans can cause by long-term exposal to Steel Heart Disease. The minimum time is unknown, largely because of the aforementioned loss of Patient 0. For the same reason, no known cure exists. Below is a list of theories as to the origin of Steel Heart Disease.
''Short Circuited Theory''

Originating from the phenomenon found in [[Level 3]], Short Circuited Theory suggests the cause of Steel Heart Disease to be caused by anomalous electricity. The theory points to other electrical phenomenon such as [[Phenomenon 12|The Flicker]] and the abnormal quality of power sources found in levels like [[Level 754]] to support this theory.
''Sentinel Theory''

Sentinel Theory suggests that machine-human entities such as [[Entity 109|Sentinels]] and mechanically familiar entities like [[Crunches]] being responsible for the spread of Steel Heart Disease. Namely, the lack of reproductive systems for Sentinels lead some to believe they operate on a virus-like system to sustain their population.
'''Kaikibuyo Log 04'''
'''Foreword:''' Between May 22nd, and June 13th, Patient 0 spent the time writing various sentences and laying them on the ground. As of June 16th, no signs of writing were made. This log is a collection of all those notes. '''Date:''' June 16th, 200X
I MISS YOU, ADRIAN ITS BEEN 120 DAYS I COUNTED EACH ONE HOPING THAT IT WOULD CHANGE IT NEVER DID IVE BEEN ALONE FOR SO LONG MY BODY HAS LOST BEAUTY I AM NO LONGER VINNY IM HIS REPLACEMENT YOU KNOW THAT, DONT YOU? IS THAT WHY YOU DONT TALK IS THAT WHY NOBODY TALKS IM LEFT IN THE DARK BOTH OF MIND AND BODY EVERYTHING FEELS WRONG IM SCARED BUT NONE ONE COMFORTS ME YOULL BE HERE WHEN IM CURED RIGHT? WILL I BE CURED? ALL THEY DO IS WATCH ME IM PROMISED THE WORLD IS THIS THE PROMISED WORLD? JUST A DAMN SLICE OF HELL? PLEASE. COME BACK ADRIAN I LOVED YOU I STILL LOVE YOU
'''Log End'''

'''Credits'''
''Author:'' [[User:PortulTrademark|PortulTrademark]]
